accurate.why: All details match bill text including biographical facts, address, and designation language.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all facts correspond to bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as a commemorative designation for Agent Maceda.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes the references provision and that no other substantive changes to federal law are made.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers designation, findings, and references provision.

concise.why: No padding or repetition; appropriate detail.

correct_entities.why: CBP and Air and Marine Operations correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: All dates and the address match bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
